project.name: TITAN VERITAS
project.purpose: OSINT system to identify football players of San Marino diaspora origin (primarily Argentina) who may qualify for citizenship via Jus Sanguinis, for recruitment by FSGC (Federazione Sammarinese Giuoco Calcio)

commands: init-db — Create schema, seed surnames/clusters, optional JSON import
search — Full pipeline: Wikidata + BDFA + API-Football per surname
enrich — OSINT enrichment via CEMLA + Ellis Island
bdfa-enrich — Scrape BDFA profiles to fill gaps
score — Recalculate TITAN scores for all candidates
export — Export to JSON (React HUD) and CSV
export-html — Generate static executive HTML report
seed-export — Dump DB to offline JSON seed
stats — Print DB statistics and top 10

package_structure.titan_veritas/config.py: Central config, loads .env, defines surnames/hubs/URLs/rate limits
package_structure.titan_veritas/core/deduplication.py: RapidFuzz-based dedup engine (ID match + fuzzy name)
package_structure.titan_veritas/db/connection.py: Thread-safe SQLite singleton with WAL mode
package_structure.titan_veritas/scrapers/api_football.py: API-Football client with queue system + caching
package_structure.titan_veritas/osint/cemla.py: CEMLA immigration archives via StealthyFetcher + static fallback
package_structure.titan_veritas/osint/ellis_island.py: Ellis Island archives via Fetcher + static fallback

db_tables: surname — SM surnames with tier and incidence

components.W_geo: Geography: birth/nationality in diaspora hub = 15-25 pts
components.V_osint: Multiplier: both CEMLA+Ellis = 1.8x, one source = 1.5x, none = 1.0x

wikidata.method: Phase 1: SPARQL finds footballers (P106=Q937857) by surname. Phase 2: wbgetentities in batches of 50 for enrichment
wikidata.http_client: scrapling.Fetcher (curl_cffi TLS impersonation), StealthyFetcher as fallback

bdfa.method: Search via buscar.asp, then profile scraping for DOB/club/position

api_football.queue_system: SQLite api_queue table for multi-day processing
api_football.caching: Full response caching in api_cache table

cemla.method: StealthyFetcher (Camoufox/Playwright) with page_action callback for form automation
cemla.challenge: BotDetect CAPTCHA — live scraping often fails
cemla.fallback: Static lookup: 57 known SM emigrant surnames

ellis_island.challenge: Likely JS-rendered SPA — Fetcher may get empty results
ellis_island.fallback: Static lookup: 19 known SM-USA emigrant surnames

database_state.top_player: T. Rossi (Godoy Cruz, Liga Profesional, Age 26)

surnames.note: v5 had 669 target surnames; v6 focuses on 48 highest-value surnames

implemented: 6 KPI cards (total, elite, Tier 1, countries, age coverage, avg score)
6 filters: Tier dropdown, Country cluster, Score slider, Age toggle, OSINT toggle
Player cards with color-coded score badges (gold/green/blue/gray)
Analisi Candidato section with human-readable labels (Endemico/Probabile/Generico)
External links to Wikidata and BDFA profiles
Results capped at top 150 by score
missing: No CSV/PDF export from filtered results
No sorting options (only by score descending)

critical.description: score_player() resets is_filtered_out based only on lethal filters, overwriting manual filters (tier3_cutoff, duplicate_of). Running 'score' command after 'tier3-cutoff' or 'dedupe' undoes those filters.
critical.workaround: Always run tier3-cutoff and dedupe AFTER score, never before
critical.fix: Modify score_player() to preserve existing filter_reason if it starts with 'tier3_cutoff' or 'duplicate_of'

critical.description: CandidateRepo.upsert() matches on (first_name, last_name, date_of_birth=? OR date_of_birth IS NULL). When DOB is None (most API-Football imports), any existing player with same name gets overwritten regardless of actual DOB. Causes false merges for common names like Rossi.
critical.fix: Tighten match: require at least one additional field match (club, birth_country) when DOB is NULL

critical.description: Search uses parameter ?q=surname instead of ?apellido=surname (which legacy v5 used). The ?q parameter is unverified against BDFA's actual ASP backend and likely returns 0 results silently.
critical.fix: Change to ?apellido= or verify which parameter BDFA actually accepts

minor.description: Missing scrapling and rapidfuzz (critical runtime deps). Contains 5 unused deps: beautifulsoup4, jellyfish, thefuzz, python-Levenshtein, tenacity, aiohttp
minor.fix: Add scrapling, rapidfuzz. Remove dead deps.

minor.description: ARGENTINA_LEAGUES has wrong IDs for lower leagues (131-135 return 0 teams). Correct IDs: Primera Nacional=96, B Metro=233, C=234, D=235, Federal A=232. The api_football.py queue code uses correct IDs but config.py still has wrong ones.
minor.fix: Update config.py ARGENTINA_LEAGUES to match correct IDs

minor.description: heritage.statueofliberty.org is likely a JS-rendered SPA. scrapling.Fetcher (non-browser) gets empty HTML shell. Silently falls through to static fallback without detecting the failure.
minor.fix: Switch to StealthyFetcher for live scraping, or add content detection to trigger fallback explicitly

actually_used: scrapling (Fetcher, StealthyFetcher, Adaptor) — HTTP + browser automation
rapidfuzz — fuzzy string matching for deduplication
